review_reason: Phase 5 sorries are architecturally unprovable without S5 axiom. Succ-chain bypass infrastructure is complete but DirectMultiFamilyBFMCS retains 3 sorries as documented architectural limitation.

verification.notes: DirectMultiFamilyBFMCS has 3 sorries documented as mathematically unprovable without S5. Succ-chain bypass path (CanonicalTaskTaskFrame) has 0 sorries.
